ArtifactMetadata.Summary: Task list for Quiz Library in Quiz Tab

args.CodeContent:

- [ ] Add `isLibraryModalOpen` state to `QuizTab.tsx`.
- [ ] Build "Thư viện đề" UI (Modal or Table) in `QuizTab.tsx`.
- [ ] Bind "Tải đề" button to set `selectedTopic` and start quiz/close modal.
